title: Auto-detect repo
body: Reads the git remote — no config required. Override with -repo owner/name for any other repo.

title: Idempotent
body: Re-run freely. An identity marker in the issue body prevents duplicates even if the ref cache is lost.

title: Cross-repo linking
body: specsync link writes links.md and pushes a Related section to both issues automatically.

title: Issue-first pull
body: Pull any existing issue into a local spec. The ref is cached so subsequent pushes update — never duplicate.

title: Planning scan
body: specsync scan shows what already exists for an area — in-flight changes, loose issues, recent commits — before you plan.

title: Release follow-up
body: specsync release-plan reconstructs what shipped, what's loose, and an advisory bump — using OpenSpec requirement deltas as a release signal no commit-only tool can see.

title: Agent-friendly
body: A Claude Code skill file ships with specsync so AI agents can plan and create linked issues without extra instructions.

title: Dry-run everything
body: Every command accepts -dry-run. Preview the full rendered body and all gh calls before committing.
